keto.title: Keto Calculator
keto.description: Calculate your personalized keto macros based on your calorie needs and goals.

faq.a: A very low-carb (≤50 g/day), high-fat diet. The body shifts to ketone bodies as its main energy source. Source: AHA scientific statement 2021.

faq.q: How many carbs are allowed on keto?
faq.a: Standard keto: 20–50 g net carbs/day. Strict keto: < 20 g. Net carbs = total carbs minus fiber.
Classic: 70–75 % fat, 20–25 % protein, 5–10 % carbs. Excess protein can disrupt ketosis via gluconeogenesis.

faq.q: How long does it take to enter ketosis?
faq.a: 2–7 days with strict carb restriction. Blood ketones > 0.5 mmol/L = nutritional ketosis. 'Keto flu' (fatigue, headache) is common in the first week.

faq.q: What are the risks of keto?
faq.a: Elevated LDL cholesterol, kidney stones, nutrient deficiencies (B vitamins, magnesium), constipation. Contraindicated in pregnancy, type-1 diabetes, and liver disease.

faq.q: Is keto better for weight loss than other diets?
faq.a: Studies show fast initial loss but no significant long-term (>12 months) advantage over calorie-matched mixed diets (NEJM 2018).
